name: software-security
description: Software-security domain ontology — the software-facing slice of security: threats, vulnerabilities, controls, threat actors, campaigns, indicators of compromise, malware, supply-chain risk, policies, incidents, frameworks, and assessments, grounded in MITRE ATT&CK/CAPEC, CVE/CWE/NVD, NIST 800-53/OSCAL/800-161r1, STIX 2.1, OWASP, and VERIS. Extends engineering-base.
